description: A designed pull-quote graphic on a dark navy-blue background featuring a large faint decorative open-quotation-mark watermark behind the text. The main quote is set in light blue/white sans-serif type with select phrases bolded for emphasis: '“Bad actors are taking advantage of this humanitarian program. President Trump and Secretary Noem are taking decisive action to make America safe again.”' Below the quote, a light blue attribution box contains dark text reading 'Matthew Tragesser,' (bold) and 'Chief of Public Affairs at USCIS' (italic). The composition is a standard official messaging/quote-card template. The propaganda technique frames the termination of Temporary Protected Status for Afghanistan as a fraud-fighting, public-safety measure, echoing the 'make America safe again' MAGA slogan and invoking Trump and DHS Secretary Noem by name. Target audience: general public and political base.
notable_text: “Bad actors are taking advantage of this humanitarian program. President Trump and Secretary Noem are taking decisive action to make America safe again.” — Matthew Tragesser, Chief of Public Affairs at USCIS
